# Rocks of Galilee — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Rocks of Galilee is a deeply spiritual and faith-driven brand created by Israel-based artisans living near Bethlehem. The brand gathers authentic stones from the shores of the Sea of Galilee — one of Christianity's most sacred sites — and incorporates them into handcrafted home decor pieces. The two signature pieces are life-size sculpted hands holding the stones crowned with a cross, and delicate angel wings cradling the same sacred stones. The brand's mission is deeply emotional and compassionate: to bring the Holy Land to those who cannot travel there, offering a tangible, sacred connection to where Jesus walked, taught, and performed miracles. The atmosphere is reverent, warm, and deeply personal — bridging geography and faith through simple, meaningful objects.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://rocks-of-galilee.zappy5.app
Own a piece of sacred ground where Jesus walked. Rocks of Galilee crafts authentic Holy Land gifts from real Sea of Galilee stones — order yours today.

### Pieces
https://rocks-of-galilee.zappy5.app/pieces
Explore sculpted angel wings and holy hands cradling real Galilee stones. Unique baptism gifts from Israel, handmade near Bethlehem — shop our full collection now.

### Story
https://rocks-of-galilee.zappy5.app/story
Discover how Israel-based artisans near Bethlehem gather sacred stones and pour devotion into every piece — a mission to bring the Holy Land to believers worldwide.

### Contact
https://rocks-of-galilee.zappy5.app/contact
Have a question or want to gift someone a sacred piece of Israel? Reach out to Rocks of Galilee and let us help you find the perfect Religious home decor Christian treasure.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Rocks of Galilee
Rocks of Galilee is a deeply spiritual and faith-driven brand created by Israel-based artisans living near Bethlehem. The brand gathers authentic stones from the shores of the Sea of Galilee — one of Christianity's most sacred sites — and incorporates them into handcrafted home decor pieces. The two signature pieces are life-size sculpted hands holding the stones crowned with a cross, and delicate angel wings cradling the same sacred stones. The brand's mission is deeply emotional and compassionate: to bring the Holy Land to those who cannot travel there, offering a tangible, sacred connection to where Jesus walked, taught, and performed miracles. The atmosphere is reverent, warm, and deeply personal — bridging geography and faith through simple, meaningful objects.

## Services/Products
- Life-size sculpted hands holding authentic Sea of Galilee stones with a cross
- Angel wings sculpture holding sacred stones from the Sea of Galilee
- Meaningful spiritual gifts for baptisms, Easter, Christmas, and personal devotion

## Target Audience
Christians worldwide who long to connect with the Holy Land, including elderly believers, families, and young Christians who cannot travel to Israel

## Industry
Christian religious gifts and home decor

---
